summary: Verified implementation of On-Demand features: 1) Push notification on dispatch accept with ETA calculation, 2) Duration slider (30min-7hr) replacing fixed time buttons, 3) Surfboard/ocean crew visualization. All code implementations verified via code review. Frontend compiles without errors. On-Demand tab shows expected 'No Photographers Available' message.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend dispatch.py accept_dispatch (lines 505-610): Push notification correctly integrated via onesignal_service.send_notification() with ETA calculation based on haversine distance
OneSignal service send_on_demand_accepted_notification (lines 161-185): Properly formats message '{photographer} is on the way! ETA: ~{minutes} min' with custom 'arrival' sound
Frontend OnDemandRequestDrawer: Duration slider (lines 596-641) uses type='range' with min/max from photographer settings (0.5-7 hours)
Quick duration buttons (30m, 1h, 2h, 3h) filter based on photographer min/max settings (lines 626-640)
SurfboardAvatar component (lines 309-366): SVG surfboard with colored fill/stroke, avatar overlay, captain crown for 'You'
EmptySeat component (lines 370-389): Dashed surfboard outline with '+' icon for adding crew
Ocean background (lines 671-678): Gradient cyan-to-blue with wave SVG decoration at bottom
context_for_next_testing_agent: OnDemandRequestDrawer cannot be fully tested interactively without an active on-demand photographer. The component structure verified via code review shows: 1) Duration slider with photographer-controlled min/max (default 30min-7hr), 2) Quick buttons (30m, 1h, 2h, 3h), 3) Surfboard crew visualization with ocean background. Push notification integration verified in backend dispatch.py accept endpoint.

on_demand_tab_content.details: Location prompt, 'No Photographers Available' message, and Refresh button all present

push_notification_integration.details: Backend dispatch.py accept_dispatch calls onesignal_service.send_notification with proper message format and ETA

onesignal_service_method.details: send_on_demand_accepted_notification method exists with correct parameters and message format

duration_slider.details: type='range' input with min/max from photographer settings, step=0.5, gradient fill styling

quick_duration_buttons.details: [0.5, 1, 2, 3] hours filtered by photographer min/max settings

surfboard_crew_visualization.details: SurfboardAvatar with SVG surfboard, EmptySeat with dashed outline, ocean gradient background with wave SVG

mocked_apis.note: OneSignal push notifications are API key dependent - cannot test actual delivery without valid keys
